allow: PowerShell(Get-Command node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Get-Command npm -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; $env:PATH -split ';' | Where-Object { $_ -match 'node|npm' })
Bash(powershell -Command 'Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "CommandLine LIKE '\\''%tsx watch src/index.ts%'\\''" | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.ProcessId -Force }')
PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 4000 -State Listen | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force }; Write-Output "done")

PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 4000,5175 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Write-Output "done")
